creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to cp.piber from comment #2)
13.2 is not supported anymore. Update to 13.3 or build all packages from ports self.
But some ports can no longer be build on 13.2.

You can chat with other FreeBSD users and developers in IRC and Discord:
https://wiki.freebsd.org/IRC
https://wiki.freebsd.org/Discord/DiscordServer
